text.title: SDD Workflows Navigation Hub Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Does the feature directory exist on disk?

conclusion.verdict: route to design or plan phase per earliest-non-Accepted-input rule.
route to workflow-spec-phase; spec must reach Accepted first.
emit blocked route naming 'feature_dir missing' as the specific blocker.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, Skip-If clear → feature dir exists → spec.md frontmatter status is Accepted → earliest-non-Accepted-input = design → emit route to workflow-design-phase.
